_meta.title: Medical Astrology — The Diagnostic Layer
_meta.subtitle: Planet → body system → endocrine → nervous system → root cause symptom map
_meta.purpose: This is the connective tissue of Astryx. It translates astrological data into clinical anatomy and plain-language symptom interpretation. Same birth data → same diagnostic output. The engine cross-references this file with cellSalts.json (sign-based mineral layer), sacredBotanicals.json (plant prescription), crystalsExpanded.json (mineral resonance), and sacredTones_nervousSystem.json (frequency intervention) to generate the complete five-sense protocol.
_meta.lineage: Synthesizes Hippocratic medical astrology, Nicholas Culpeper (1652), Cornell's Encyclopaedia of Medical Astrology (1933), Charles Carter, Donna Cunningham, Eileen Nauman, and modern psychosomatic medicine. Cross-validated with Carey's biochemic system.
_meta.principle: Every planet governs a specific anatomical territory, endocrine gland, and nervous-system pathway. When a natal planet is stressed (by aspect, transit, or progression) OR when a transiting planet activates a sensitive natal point, the symptom signature manifests in that territory. The root cause is never just 'astrological' — it is the planet's physiological correlate expressing dysregulation.
_meta.probabilisticFraming: All output must use 'may suggest', 'may indicate', 'may correlate with'. Never 'you have' or 'you are'. This is calibration, not prediction. Always recommend consultation with licensed healthcare providers for medical concerns.

cellSaltsViaRuledSigns: Leo → Magnesia Phosphorica (Mag Phos) — heart and motor nerve relaxant

whenStressed.headline: Vitality is dimming. Identity feels uncertain. The center cannot hold.
physical: low vitality and fatigue not explained by sleep

whenActivated.headline: Life force surges. You feel radiant, central, seen.

transitInterpretation.solarReturn: Annual reset of vitality and identity — the natal Sun degree is exact once per year (your birthday). This is the highest-leverage day for setting the year's intentions.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional/physical re-centering. Hormonal and digestive recalibration over 2-3 days.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Gentle solar exposure, heart-opening practice, Red Lotus tea

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Mental clarity restored. Voice strengthens. Speech and writing flow.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Solar practice before important communications

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Authority and structure align. Long-term commitments crystallize.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Spinal alignment work; sun salutation on bare earth

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Your year's vitality cycle checks in with itself — identity and life force stand in the same light, and you can see yourself plainly.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Sunlight on skin, the Sun tone at the heart center, one honest look at what you want this year

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Warmth turns toward what you love — affection, beauty, and self-worth feel lit from within.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Wear or make something beautiful on purpose; rose or hibiscus tea; let yourself be seen

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Light hits the engine — drive, heat, and will come online together. Strong hours for decisive action; mind the temper of the flame.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Move first, decide second — a brisk walk or training session, then the long cooling exhale

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Vitality expands toward optimism — the day runs generous and confident, and everything looks a size bigger in this light.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: One bold move and one honest limit; celebrate with presence, not excess

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: A jolt of light through the routine — sudden clarity, restlessness, the urge to break pattern. Insight arrives sideways.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Give the spark a channel — change the route, the playlist, the desk; then ground with bare feet and a long exhale

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The edges of self soften in the light — imagination and empathy rise while hard focus mists over. Beautiful for art, blurry for contracts.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Water, music, and the Neptune tone over big decisions; let the signature wait a day

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Light reaches the deep layer — power, truth, and what's been buried ask to be seen. Intensity with a purpose.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: One honest journal page; the Pluto tone low on the body; keep any confrontation clean and brief

transitInterpretation.frequencyPerYear: Touches every natal degree once annually

rootCauseSignatures.vitality_collapse: Sun afflicted by Saturn (compression) or in fall in Libra (other-orientation drains core)

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your central life force. Your heart, your spine, your sense of who you are. The part of you that says 'I am'.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: You feel radiant, centered, and seen. Your heart is steady. Your back is strong. People look to you.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: Your vitality dims. Your heart races or skips. You feel invisible or like an imposter. Your back hurts in the middle. You can't find the center of yourself.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Direct sunlight on bare skin. Heart-opening movement. Frankincense, rosemary, or orange essential oil. Red Lotus or rose tea. 126.22 Hz (Sun fork) to the heart center. Citrine or sunstone on the thymus.

whenStressed.headline: Emotions are flooding. The body holds water. You can't digest what's happening.
emotional: moodiness that tracks the lunar cycle
mental: inability to think clearly when emotionally flooded

whenActivated.headline: Emotional fluency. Deep rest. The body knows how to nourish itself.

transitInterpretation.lunarReturn: The Moon returns to its natal degree once every 27.3 days. This is the monthly emotional/digestive reset point.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional integration with identity. Heart-belly axis aligns.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Restorative rest, Moon-water hydration

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional weight. Old grief surfaces. Skin and bones may feel heavier.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Calc Phos cell salt + warmth + boundaries against draining contact

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Feelings flare hot and quick — heat rises where you feel unseen.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Cooling foods, slow movement; name the need before the flare speaks for you

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The monthly emotional reset — feelings return to their home water. A natural day to refill rather than spend.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Warm food, an early night, moonlit stillness; the Moon tone at the heart

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Feeling and thought share one channel — words carry more water than usual. Honest talk lands; sharp talk cuts deeper than intended.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Speak the feeling before analyzing it; chamomile or lemon-balm tea; write three unedited lines

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Soft weather for the heart — tenderness, comfort, and closeness come easily. Receiving counts as much as giving today.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Shared food, soft textures, rose tea; let affection land without deflecting it

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Feelings run generous and buoyant — emotional appetite grows, warmth expands, and so can overdoing.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Feed connection, not just appetite — invite someone to the table; sweet tea, open window

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional static — moods flicker fast and the body wants novelty. Nothing is wrong; the water is simply electric for a few hours.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Shake it through the body — dance or a brisk walk; then the Earth tone to settle the charge

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: High tide of sensitivity — dreams, moods, and other people's weather soak through. Rich inner life, thin boundaries.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: A salt bath or a long shower rinse, quiet music, the Moon tone; choose gentle company

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Feelings run deep and undiluted for a few hours — old currents surface with force and want to move through, not take over.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: A long-exhale practice, dark and quiet, one page of what's true; the wave passes by morning

transitInterpretation.transitDurationDays: 2-3 hours per natal degree (Moon moves fast)
transitInterpretation.frequencyPerMonth: Touches every natal point every 27-29 days

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your emotional body. Your gut. Your fluids. Your monthly cycles. The part of you that feels and remembers.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: You sleep well. Your digestion is smooth. Your emotions move through you without drowning you. You trust your intuition.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: You're flooded with feelings you can't name. Your stomach is upset. You retain water. You can't sleep or you sleep too much. Old emotional patterns are running the show.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Moon-water (water charged under moonlight). Warm rocking movement. Chamomile, jasmine, or sandalwood. White Lotus tea before sleep. 210.42 Hz (Moon fork) on the belly. Moonstone on the womb space or sacrum.

whenStressed.headline: The signaling system is overloaded. Thoughts race, words tangle, breath shallows.

whenActivated.headline: Quick clear thinking. Words flow. The whole nervous system signals cleanly.

transitInterpretation.mercuryReturn: Mercury returns to natal degree about once per year (with retrograde variations) — annual cognitive reset.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional articulation. Easier to name what you feel.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Journaling, therapy session, important conversations

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Serious thinking. Long-form writing. Decisions crystallize.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Strategic planning, contracts, documentation

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Imaginative but confusing. Boundary between thought and fantasy thins.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Avoid signing contracts; meditation; creative writing

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The mind turns toward the self — naming who you are and what you want gets easier. Clear-voice hours.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Say the important thing out loud once; morning light on the page while you write it down

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Mind meets mind — your natural thinking style runs amplified. Ideas breed fast; capturing beats polishing.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Keep a capture list, not a finished draft; peppermint or tulsi tea; single-task in short breath-length sprints

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Words turn warm — charm, tact, and aesthetic sense flow into speech. The right sentence can open a heart today.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Write the note, make the call, choose the beautiful word; something floral in the cup while you do

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Thought picks up an edge — fast, decisive, cutting. Sharp hours for debate and hard calls; the blade needs a sheath.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Draft hot, send cool — one full exhale between writing and sending; walk off the surplus

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The mind zooms out — big-picture thinking, teaching, and persuasion swell. Details may slip beneath the vision.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Sketch the vision, then circle three facts to verify; a citrus scent at the desk keeps the mind bright

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Lightning in the wiring — sudden insights, fast connections, jumpy attention. Genius hours, if you catch them as they land.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Paper within reach all day; one slow breath to ground each burst before chasing the next

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Thought drills toward the root — research, undercurrents, and whole truths call. The mind stops accepting the polite version.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: One deep question pursued fully; stop at sundown and empty what you found onto paper

transitInterpretation.mercuryRetrograde: 3 weeks, 3x per year. Communication, signing, and travel are more error-prone. Body responds with respiratory or nervous-system glitches. Use the period for REview, REvise, REflect — not new initiation.

rootCauseSignatures.chronic_anxiety_thinking_type: Mercury afflicted by Saturn (compression of thought) or Uranus (electrical overstimulation)
rootCauseSignatures.respiratory_issues_upper: Mercury-Saturn (cold, dry, asthma) or Mercury in Gemini afflicted

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your thinking, speaking, and signaling. Your breath. Your hands. The part of you that names things, makes connections, communicates.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: Your thoughts come clear. You speak what you mean. You breathe deeply and evenly. Your hands work skillfully.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: Your thoughts race or loop. You can't find the words. Your breath is shallow. You feel anxious in a 'wired' way. Your thyroid may swing or your gut may rebel.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Alternate nostril breathing. Peppermint, eucalyptus, or basil oil. Kali Mur or Kali Sulph cell salt depending on which Mercury-ruled sign is activated. 141.27 Hz (Mercury fork) at the throat. Blue lace agate or aquamarine on the throat.

whenStressed.headline: The relational and harmonic field is off. The body holds, the heart contracts, the kidneys strain.

whenActivated.headline: Beauty, ease, magnetism. Pleasure is accessible. Relationships flow.

transitInterpretation.venusReturn: Venus returns to natal degree about once per year (with retrograde variations) — annual reset of values, pleasure, relating.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional sweetness. Easier to receive love and comfort.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Self-care practices, time with loved ones

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Magnetism runs high — creative and sensual current in the same channel, and both want expression.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Give it somewhere to go — movement, creative work, connection with a partner

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Mature love. Long-term commitment energy. Or contraction if love has been suppressed.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Have the hard relationship conversation

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Grace moves toward the center — you are easier to love and easier to see today. Worth and identity warm each other.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Accept the compliment without deflecting; wear the good thing; rose tea taken in real light

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The heart finds its words — affection becomes sayable and agreements come kindly.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Have the tender conversation you've postponed; write it first if the voice catches

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Your love nature returns to its birth position — an annual reset of taste, desire, and worth. What do you actually find beautiful now?

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Pleasure and abundance share the room — generous, indulgent, warm-hearted weather. Enjoy it with one anchor down.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Celebrate with presence over quantity; share the table; close the evening with the Earth tone

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Attraction goes electric — the unfamiliar glitters and freedom flirts with closeness. Thrilling weather; not a day for permanent vows.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Romance mist — longing, idealization, and beauty swell together. Exquisite for art and devotion; soft-focus for judgment.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Make something beautiful instead of deciding something binding; jasmine scent, water sounds

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Desire deepens past the surface — intimacy wants truth and attachments show their roots. Magnetic, and consequential.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Let closeness be honest rather than perfect; slow breath low in the belly; keep your center

transitInterpretation.venusRetrograde: Every 18 months for ~40 days. RE-view of values, RE-connect with old loves, RE-evaluate what you find beautiful. Body responds with hormonal shifts and skin recalibration.

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your sense of beauty, value, and pleasure. Your kidneys, ovaries, throat, and skin. The part of you that loves and receives love.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: Your skin glows. Your hormones cycle smoothly. You receive easily. You see beauty everywhere. You know your worth.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: Your lower back aches. Your kidneys feel strained. Your skin breaks out. Your hormones swing. You can't find pleasure. You compare yourself to others and lose.

whenStressed.headline: The activation system is overheating or burned out. Inflammation, accidents, rage.

whenActivated.headline: Drive online. Courage. Focused action. The body moves with power and precision.

transitInterpretation.marsReturn: Mars returns to natal degree about every 2 years — biennial activation reset.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Vitality and drive align. Excellent for athletic peaks.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Train hard, take action

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional heat rises fast — the belly tightens and patience shortens. The water is boiling, not broken.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Cooling foods and a slow exhale; let big decisions wait for calmer water

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Frustration meets restriction. Risk of injury from forcing through resistance.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Slow down, address structural issue, do not push

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Intensity at maximum — the body runs on deep reserves; move deliberately.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Avoid unnecessary risk, channel through deep training

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Heat in the wiring — speech quickens, patience thins, wit sharpens to a point. Words move faster than second thoughts.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Move the body before the meeting; one full breath between thought and speech

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Drive meets desire — passion, pursuit, and creative heat run in one current. Magnetic hours; steer them somewhere worthy.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Give the current a form — dance, make, touch, build; cool water on the wrists after

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Your engine returns to its birth setting — a two-year reset of drive and courage. How you pursue and how you defend are up for renewal.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Choose the next campaign consciously; train the body this week; the Mars tone at the thigh, Earth tone to close

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Fuel meets amplifier — bold, expansive, competitive energy for days. Big pushes land; overreach is the shadow.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Pick ONE bold move and complete it; leave the second for tomorrow; a long exhale at the finish line

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Volatile spark — impulse and rebellion surge together. Reflexes run fast and patience runs low; brilliant or reckless by a hair.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: No sudden irreversible moves; burn the charge physically first — sprint, drum, split wood

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The engine runs on mist — effort feels diffuse, targets blur, energy leaks toward escape. Not weakness; fogged fuel.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Lower the bar to one clear task; move like water — swim, stretch, breathe; guard sleep

transitInterpretation.marsRetrograde: Every 2 years for ~10 weeks. RE-view of how you assert. Risk of suppressed anger surfacing as illness.
transitInterpretation.transitDurationDays: 2-3 days exact per natal point; full residence in a sign ~6-7 weeks (longer in retrograde)

rootCauseSignatures.acute_inflammation_anywhere: Mars-Uranus (sudden) or Mars in stress aspect
rootCauseSignatures.chronic_adrenal_burnout: Sustained Mars activation, especially Mars-Saturn (push-pull burnout)

rootCauseSignatures.muscle_injury_proneness: Mars-Saturn (forcing through restriction) or Mars-Neptune (lack of awareness)

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your drive, your fight, your fire. Your adrenals. Your muscles. Your iron. The part of you that takes action and protects.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: You move with energy and precision. You can say no. You take action. Inflammation resolves quickly. You sleep well after exertion.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: You're inflamed, injured, or burnt out. You're either raging or numb. Your adrenals feel hammered. You've been pushing too long.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Cooling. Slow movement (not collapse — restoration). Ginger, black pepper, cinnamon (warming when balanced; avoid when inflamed). Kali Phos (nerves) or Calc Sulph (deep cleanse). 144.72 Hz (Mars fork) on the adrenals (mid-back) or lower belly. Hematite or red jasper grounded.

whenStressed.headline: Expansion has tipped into excess. The liver is congested. Growth is out of regulation.
physical: weight that accumulates around excess — the body storing more than it burns
sweetness overload — blood-sugar weather that swings with indulgence (classically flagged with an afflicted Moon)
emotional: loss of faith / spiritual emptiness when blocked
expansion that overshoots, then the crash after the high

whenActivated.headline: Abundance. Optimism. Growth in healthy regulation. The body metabolizes life with ease.

transitInterpretation.jupiterReturn: Jupiter returns to natal degree every ~12 years — major expansion/wisdom cycle (ages 12, 24, 36, 48, 60, 72, 84).

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Vitality expansion. Confidence and recognition surge.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Take the opportunity, but watch overcommitment

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional abundance. A fertile, generous window.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Sweet teas, hold emotional space generously

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Discipline meets expansion. Long-form structure built that lasts.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Launch major projects with realistic scope

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The mind is handed a wider map — learning, publishing, and persuasion swell for weeks. Optimism thinks in headlines; verify the fine print.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Start the course, the book, the pitch — and keep a small fact-checking ritual beside the vision

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: A season of sweetness — love, beauty, and receiving expand. Generosity flows both directions if you let it.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Say yes to the invitation; make room to receive; pass the abundance forward

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Drive gets a tailwind — courage and capacity expand for weeks. Champion energy; pace it like a season, not a sprint.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Set a training arc instead of one heroic day; mark milestones with rest

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The twelve-year expansion gate reopens — faith, growth, and horizon reset for the next cycle. Plant big, patient seeds.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Write the twelve-year wish once, plainly; then take its smallest first step this week

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Growth through breakthrough — luck favors the experiment and windows open suddenly. Stay loose enough to step through.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Keep one experiment running at all times this season; review it weekly, lightly

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Faith and imagination swell together — visionary, compassionate, boundary-soft weather for weeks.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Feed the vision daily with music or water or practice — and date-stamp big decisions for a second, clear-eyed read

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Expansion reaches the deep engine — ambition, influence, and resources want to scale. Power grows; keep it answerable.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Name what the ambition serves before feeding it; keep one trusted voice in the loop

transitInterpretation.transitDurationDays: 5-10 days exact per natal point; full residence in a sign ~12 months

rootCauseSignatures.liver_congestion_metabolic_syndrome: Jupiter in Sagittarius/Pisces afflicted, especially with Saturn (slowed metabolism) or Moon (insulin)
rootCauseSignatures.hip_sciatica_pain: Jupiter in Sagittarius afflicted, or Jupiter-Saturn through hip area

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your expansion, growth, optimism, faith. Your liver. Your hips and thighs. Your metabolism. The part of you that says yes to life.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: Your liver is clean. You metabolize food and life events with ease. You feel abundant. Faith comes naturally, without naivety.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: Your liver is sluggish. You've gained weight that won't shift. Your hips ache. You've over-committed. Faith has drained away, or swung to grandiose faith that ignores reality.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Liver-supportive bitters (dandelion, milk thistle). Long walks. Clove, nutmeg, or sweet orange. Silica or Ferr Phos cell salt. 183.58 Hz (Jupiter fork) over the liver (right upper abdomen). Lapis lazuli or amethyst on the third eye for wisdom restoration.

whenStressed.headline: The structure is compressing. Cortisol stays high. Joints lock. The body feels heavy and cold.
physical: a long heaviness that settles into the body — cold extremities, heavy limbs
low cortisol after sustained depletion (Addisonian pattern)
emotional: chronic emotional weight without clear cause
fear of failure / fear of time running out

whenActivated.headline: Mastery, integrity, deep structure. The body holds itself with dignity. Long-term work bears fruit.

transitInterpretation.saturnReturn: Saturn returns to natal degree every ~29.5 years (ages 28-30, 58-60, 87-90). Major life-restructuring period. Often health crises that demand structural change.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: A compressed, heavier vitality — the spine and chest may ask for extra support. Questions of authority come into focus.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Spinal alignment work; examine identity structures. Any chest or heart sensation deserves prompt attention from your healthcare provider

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: A slowed, taxed quality — the body's stress rhythm runs heavy and inner flow feels sluggish. Emotional heaviness with no clear source. Maternal/family weight surfacing.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Ashwagandha + Cleavers tea. Black Tourmaline on sacrum. 147.85 Hz Saturn fork. Calc Phos cell salt. No high-intensity movement.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Serious, structured thinking — with a heavier, compressed quality; the breath may run shallow.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Long-form work that uses Saturn's discipline; breath work and pacing support this transit

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Relationship reality check. Love must mature or release. The skin and lower back may speak up.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Honest relationship conversations; warmth over the lower back; hydrate well

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Restricted action. Risk of pushing through injury. Bone or joint stress.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Slow down, respect physical limits

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Total restructuring — the old architecture of a life is audited, and only what is load-bearing stays.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Make the structural decisions consciously — work, home, bonds; small daily disciplines carry you through the audit

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The auditor meets the optimist — growth is pruned to what can bear weight. Slower expansion, but the real kind.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Cut the plans to what you'd defend out loud; steady work rhythm; warm root tea

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Structure meets the lightning — the tested and the new negotiate terms. The tension between holding and breaking has a point on both sides.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Renovate instead of demolish — keep the frame, change one wall at a time

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The real and the ideal press against each other — dreams are asked for load-bearing plans, and plans are asked for meaning.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Give the dream one concrete container — a schedule, a page, a practice; the fog lifts through form

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Bedrock season — pressure meets depth and whatever is structural in you gets stress-tested. Slow, tectonic, formative.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Long-arc discipline over quick fixes; the Earth tone daily; keep counsel with the few who hold weight

transitInterpretation.transitDurationDays: 2-3 years near exact (with 3 hits via direct/retrograde/direct motion); full residence in a sign ~2.5 years

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your structure, your bones, your endurance, your time. Your skin. Your knees. Your cortisol response to long-term stress. The part of you that builds slowly and lasts.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: Integrity runs through body and life. Your bones are strong. Your skin holds its tone. You can hold a long commitment. You age with grace.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: Everything feels heavy and cold. You're depressed without a clear reason. Your joints stiffen. You feel old before your time. You can't lift the weight you're carrying.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Warmth — physically and emotionally. Bone broth. Calc Phos cell salt. Vetiver, cedarwood, or patchouli oil. Black tourmaline or onyx on the sacrum. 147.85 Hz (Saturn fork) on the spine or knees. Sleep more than you think you need.

planets.classicalDomain: Reset, awakening, electrical shift, sudden change, freedom

nervousSystemPathway.branch: Sympathetic electrical — sudden activation, fight/flight surge

cellSaltsViaRuledSigns: Aquarius → Natrum Muriaticum (Nat Mur) — fluid distribution

whenStressed.headline: The nervous system is firing electrically out of pattern. Sudden onset symptoms appear from nowhere.
physical: heart arrhythmia / palpitations of sudden onset
emotional: feeling of being trapped that explodes outward

whenActivated.headline: Awakening. Breakthrough. The system reorganizes at a higher level.

transitInterpretation.uranusReturn: Uranus returns to natal degree once at age 84 — total awakening cycle.
transitInterpretation.uranusOpposition: Age 38-42 — Uranus opposes its natal position. The midlife awakening. Major life restructuring.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Sudden identity shift. The heart's rhythm may feel electric or jumpy. Career upheaval.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Allow the shift; do not force stability. A racing or irregular-feeling heartbeat deserves prompt attention from your healthcare provider

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Sudden emotional changes. Sleep disruption. Sudden moves or domestic changes.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Grounding breath and meditation; a warm evening cup of chamomile or oat straw tea; bare feet on the earth

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Structure breaks. Liberation from rigid patterns. Possible bone/joint surprise.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Allow what wants to fall; rebuild with new template

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Rewiring season for the mind — thought patterns update themselves, sometimes mid-sentence. Erratic brilliance over months.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: A note-catching habit everywhere you think; single-task windows; ground after every deep-work burst

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The heart's taste changes — attraction, values, and pleasure renegotiate over months. Freedom and closeness learn new terms.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Update agreements out loud instead of acting them out; beauty experiments welcome

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: High-voltage drive — action wants freedom and refuses micromanagement. Channel the charge or it discharges as haste.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Novel, intense, chosen exertion — new sport, new tempo; end each session with one full minute of stillness

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Growth by lightning — sudden opportunities and belief-shifts arrive over months. The map redraws itself; travel light.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Say yes to the door that opens twice; keep commitments modular

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: A life-stage awakening checkpoint — the authentic self audits the settled self. Restlessness with a purpose.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Change something structural on purpose before the restlessness chooses for you; ground daily

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The awakener moves through the dream — ideals modernize and old escapes lose their charm. Subtle weather, made personal.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Refresh the practices that connect you — new music for old meditation; keep water close

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Deep structures get shaken awake — long-buried patterns surface for renovation. Rare, slow, radical weather.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Change by increments you control; keep a steady witness — practitioner or friend — for what surfaces

transitInterpretation.transitDurationDays: 1-2 years near exact; full residence in a sign ~7 years

rootCauseSignatures.panic_attacks: Uranus-Mercury (mental electrical overload) or Uranus-Moon (emotional electrical)
rootCauseSignatures.heart_arrhythmia_sudden: Uranus-Sun (electrical heart) or Uranus transiting natal Sun

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your electrical nervous system. Your sudden insights. The part of you that breaks free when constraint becomes intolerable.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: Your mind has sudden useful insights. Your heart beats steadily. You sleep when you want to sleep. You can handle change.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: Panic out of nowhere. Heart skips beats or races for no reason. You can't sleep — you're wired but exhausted. You feel like you're going to explode out of your life.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Magnesium-rich foods. Grounding (literal bare feet on earth). Lemongrass, sage, or camphor. Hematite or smoky quartz at the feet. 207.36 Hz (Uranus fork) along the spine. Reduce screen time and EMF exposure. Mag Phos cell salt for spasms.

whenStressed.headline: Boundaries are dissolving. The immune system can't tell self from other. The subtle field is leaking.
physical: defenses that run low for long stretches — the body's boundaries as porous as the emotional ones
the pull toward escape — substances, food, fantasy — when feeling gets too loud
chronic fatigue with no clear cause
emotional: boundary collapse — feeling everyone else's feelings
mental: inability to discern reality from fantasy

whenActivated.headline: Subtle perception online. Compassion. Expansive insight. The body becomes permeable to grace.

transitInterpretation.neptuneTransits: Very slow — Neptune spends ~14 years in each sign. Generational transits to natal planets create multi-year dissolution/transcendence themes.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Identity dissolution. May feel 'lost' or like 'no one knows who I am anymore.' The body's defenses may run lower than usual.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Spiritual practice; extra rest and warmth; do not make permanent decisions during the peak

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional permeability. Psychic sensitivity surges. Sleep becomes vivid/dreamy.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Boundary practices; black tourmaline; reduce alcohol

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Imaginative but confused thinking. Spiritual insight or delusion. Avoid contracts.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Meditation; creative writing; do not sign legal documents

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Love's focus softens for a long season — longing, artistry, and idealization deepen. Exquisite for devotion; soft ground for judgment.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Make beauty regularly; save binding choices for clearer weather; jasmine or lotus scent; sit near water

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The will learns to swim — drive dissolves and reforms around something subtler. Effort stops pushing and starts flowing.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Water-led movement — swim, yoga, breath-paced walks; one clear task per day is a full day

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Faith goes oceanic — meaning, compassion, and vision swell across a long arc. Generous and boundless; anchor the boat.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: A grounded weekly ritual — same day, same hour — keeps the vision usable

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The dissolver meets the architecture — rigid certainties soften over a long season, and each structure is asked to hold meaning, not just weight.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Renew the why beneath each commitment; release the ones that answer with silence; form and water, daily

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Dream and awakening trade places slowly — a long, quiet recalibration of what freedom means to you.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Let the practices evolve; keep one wild hour and one still hour in every week

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The long tide turns — imagination, faith, and the ways you escape come up for life-stage review.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Trade one numbing dissolve for one nourishing one — music, water, breath; gently, over months

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The deepest waters move — surrender and power learn each other over years. Barely visible, profoundly formative.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: A long-arc contemplative practice; mark the season in a journal you rarely reread

transitInterpretation.transitDurationDays: 2-3 years near exact; very slow movement

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your immune system. Your subtle perception. Your dreams. Your boundaries — or lack of them. The part of you that touches what cannot be touched.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: Your immunity is strong because you know what's yours and what isn't. You dream vividly and remember. You feel deeply without drowning. You access spiritual insight.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: You're catching everything. You're exhausted from feeling everyone else's feelings. You're sleeping too much or having nightmares. You're confused about what's real. You may be escaping through substances or fantasy.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Boundary practices. Myrrh, lavender, or lotus oil. Egyptian Blue Lotus tea (deepest pineal/theta support). Amethyst or selenite. 211.44 Hz (Neptune fork). REDUCE psychic intake — less media, less crowds. Sleep in absolute darkness.

crossReferences.associatedCellSalt: Ferr Phos (via ruling sign Pisces) — oxygen for cellular respiration when subtle drain depletes

whenStressed.headline: Deep transformation forced. Old patterns dying hard. The body is purging at the cellular level.
physical: deep shifts moving through the reproductive center — cycles running to extremes
elimination crises (chronic constipation alternating with purge)
survival-level depletion — deeper than ordinary burnout, the reserves beneath the reserves
depletion at the cellular level that outlasts ordinary rest
the body's deepest renewal cycles asking for real attention
emotional: deep grief or rage from past trauma

whenActivated.headline: Regeneration. Profound power. The body knows how to die and be reborn cell by cell.

transitInterpretation.plutoTransits: Extremely slow — Pluto spends 12-30 years in a sign. Generational and lifetime transformation transits.

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Identity rebirth. The old self composts. The body may demand a total restructuring of habits and pace.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Allow the ending; surrender to transformation. Anything persistent in the body deserves a licensed professional's attention

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Emotional/family transformation. Deep shifts may move through the reproductive center. Old mother wounds resurface to be met.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Deep therapy support; emotional bodywork; bring anything persistent to your healthcare provider

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Relationship death-rebirth. Old loves end. Deep change may move through desire and the body's inner chemistry.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Allow relationship transformations; tend the sacral center with warmth and rest

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Compulsive drive — the body runs hot and deep; move deliberately.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Channel through intensive training; make any major medical decision slowly, with your care team

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The mind is taken to depth — thought turns forensic and words carry weight for a long season. Surface talk stops satisfying.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Study something worthy of obsession; speak less and mean more; empty the mind onto paper at night

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Power meets purpose — beliefs and ambitions are composted and regrown over years. What you are FOR becomes non-negotiable.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Rewrite the mission once a year; let dead beliefs fall without ceremony

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The transformer meets the structure — long-held architecture is pressure-tested down to bedrock. What survives becomes permanent.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Maintain the body like infrastructure — sleep, breath, the Earth tone; decide slowly, build once

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: A depth-charge under the rebel — your relationship to freedom and disruption transforms across years.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Choose your revolutions; finish one before starting the next

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: Power moves through the dream — a generational tide made personal, where illusions compost into vision.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Keep one honest mirror — a practice or a person; let the vision be revised

transitToNatalPlanets.effect: The root system regenerates — a life-stage power review at the deepest layer. Slow, total, quiet.
transitToNatalPlanets.intervention: Tend the fundamentals for a season: sleep, breath, ground, truth

plainLanguageBridge.whatItGoverns: Your power to transform. Your deepest survival programming. Your reproductive and eliminative organs. The cellular level of your body. The part of you that can die and be reborn.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsBalanced: You regenerate from anything. Your power is rooted and clean. Your reproductive system cycles healthily. You can let what needs to die, die — and rebuild what comes next.
plainLanguageBridge.whenItsOff: You're in a death-rebirth crisis you didn't ask for. Old trauma is surfacing. Your reproductive system is upheaving. You feel obsessed, controlled, or destroyed. You can't see the rebirth from inside the death.
plainLanguageBridge.howToRestore: Deep work — somatic therapy, breathwork, plant medicine in appropriate settings. Calc Sulph cell salt for deep cellular cleanse. Obsidian or black moonstone. 140.25 Hz (Pluto fork) on the sacrum / pelvic bowl. Deep resins — palo santo, myrrh. Allow the dying. Time is your medicine — Pluto transits ARE measured in years.

crossReferences.associatedCellSalt: Calc Sulph (via ruling sign Scorpio) — deep blood purification and wound healing

rootCauseIndex._description: Reverse lookup — given a symptom or root cause, which planetary signatures may be involved. Used by the engine to combine user-reported symptom with their chart to generate a prescription. Always probabilistic.

primarySignatures: Moon afflicted by Saturn or Uranus

type_breakdown.mental_loop_thinking: Mercury afflicted (especially by Saturn or Uranus)
type_breakdown.emotional_flooding: Moon afflicted (especially by Neptune or Pluto)
type_breakdown.wired_panic_electrical: Uranus contacts to Mercury, Moon, or Sun

type_breakdown.seasonal_affective: Sun in winter signs (Capricorn/Aquarius) or Sun-Saturn natal

type_breakdown.gut_inflammation: Mars in Cancer/Virgo afflicted or Mars-Moon

type_breakdown.menstrual_irregularity: Moon afflicted, especially by outer planets

type_breakdown.IBS_anxiety_type: Mercury in Virgo or Mercury-Uranus with 6th house
type_breakdown.constipation_chronic: Saturn in earth signs or Saturn-Moon

type_breakdown.deep_transformation: Pluto contacts to Moon, Venus, or 5th

engineUsage._description: How the Astryx engine should use this file alongside the other data files to produce the unified 5-sense prescription.
engineUsage.step1_inputCollection: User reports: symptom OR feeling OR area of concern. Engine receives natal chart + current transits.
engineUsage.step2_diagnosticMatch: Engine looks up symptom in rootCauseIndex → returns candidate planetary signatures. Cross-references with user's natal chart and current transits → ranks signatures by activation.
engineUsage.step3_anatomyResolution: For top-ranked planetary signature, engine pulls anatomy block → body systems + organs + endocrine + nervous system pathway.
engineUsage.step4_plainLanguageBridge: Engine pulls plainLanguageBridge → presents 3 layers: what's happening cosmically, what it's doing in your body, what to do.
engineUsage.step5_protocolGeneration: Engine pulls crossReferences from this planet → links to: cellSalts.json (mineral via ruling sign), sacredBotanicals.json (plant ally), crystalsExpanded.json (mineral resonance), sacredTones_nervousSystem.json (frequency), scents.json (aroma), colors.json (visual), planets.json (taste/body movement). One unified prescription, five sensory channels.
engineUsage.step6_practitionerOverlay: In Practitioner mode, all three layers (cosmic + body + protocol) are visible with timing data (transit duration, intervention notes). In free user mode, only middle (body) and bottom (protocol) layers shown — cosmic mechanism is the optional 'See Why' reveal.

aspectLenses.opposition: Stretched across a full axis, asking for balance —
aspectLenses.quincunx: At an odd angle, asking for adjustment —
